title: Howl from Beyond
description:
Deal 16 damage to ALL enemies.
At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], play it.
upgraded_description:
Deal 21 damage to ALL enemies.
At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], play it.
notes: This card automatically plays from the Exhaust Pile at the start of your turn, providing both immediate damage and a repeating effect.
